title: Staff Data Analyst, Marketing Analytics
required_skills: 8+ years relevant experience in analytics, data science or BI
Strong SQL and Python (pandas, scikit-learn, pyspark)
Digital and performance marketing data experience (Google Ads, Meta)
missing_skills: Google Ads / Meta data-driven platform experience
core_responsibilities: Develop quantitative analysis and statistical models for marketing decisions
Propose and defend strategic recommendations to top marketing leads
Maintain attribution models, experimentation framework, CLV models
recommended_emphasis: Score is below threshold (30) — strong mismatch on experience years and technical tools
SQL and Python are hard requirements — not in CV
8+ years requirement is significantly above CV's 4+ years
Recommend discussing with user whether to skip

company_info.size_raw: Berlin HQ, global offices — implied mid-large company
